creator: andrey@kostenko.name
text:
I've sent new version with fixed deps.

On Thu, Dec 3, 2009 at 5:05 PM, wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi,
>
>  There are some problems when build this new port.
> 1 in DEPENDS p5-DBI>=1.605 should be p5-DBI>=1.60.5
> 2 there is a build warning: prerequisite Object::Simple 2.0702 not found.
> 3 there is a PLIST error.
>
>
>  Below is the build log on my tinderbox.
>  Would you fix it ?
>
> Regards,
> wen
